query: I need assistance in crafting a 7-day travel plan for a group of 4 from Lexington to Texas. We plan to visit 3 cities in Texas from March 18th to March 24th, 2022. Please ensure that our lodging accommodations are suitable for children under 10 as we will be traveling with our younger ones. We have a budget of $16,800 for this trip.

plan.attraction: Dallas World Aquarium; Dallas Museum of Art; Reunion Tower; Klyde Warren Park
plan.accommodation: Chic Union Square One Bedroom, Dallas

plan.attraction: The Sixth Floor Museum at Dealey Plaza; Dealey Plaza; John F. Kennedy Memorial Plaza; George W. Bush Presidential Center
plan.accommodation: Chic Union Square One Bedroom, Dallas

plan.transportation: F3608910, from Dallas to San Angelo

plan.attraction: San Angelo Museum of Fine Arts; Fort Concho National Historic Landmark; Railway Museum of San Angelo; Concho Riverwalk
plan.lunch: DePalma's Italian Cafe - Downtown, San Angelo
plan.accommodation: Private small accommodation specially for you!, San Angelo

plan.attraction: Miss Hattie's Bordello Museum; International Waterlily Collection; The Bosque along the Concho River; Think In A Box - Escape Room
plan.accommodation: Private small accommodation specially for you!, San Angelo

plan.transportation: self-driving, from San Angelo to Houston
